values.value: Ezidebit provides payment accounts for registered AU/NZ businesses. Please ensure the information you provide below reflects the correct business entity.
These accounts will be linked to your EFTPOS terminal(s).
Please provide details of any additional merchants you would like to add to your payment solutions. Each merchant you add will need their own payments account with Ezidebit.

Note: All multiple merchant agreements will be sent to you to prefill some of the information for their business. Each individual multi-merchant will then be able to review and update these details before submitting.
Would you like to prefill all EFTPOS user applications?
Please review and confirm your list of multiple merchants to be added to your Eftpos terminal/s.
The public contact details provided on this form will also be used for marketing emails relating to your Amex payment products.
Would you like to set up more than one merchants on your EFTPOS terminal/s ?
Have you set up more than one merchants on your payment solution/s ?
